title: croton eremophilus
intro: Croton eremophilus, also known as the 'Blue Mountain Croton', is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help to soothe wounds and reduce pain. The health benefits of Croton eremophilus include its ability to aid in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. In terms of herbal preparations, Croton eremophilus is often used in traditional medicine to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
